data.title: $12M gift from Asbjornson Foundation to fund scholarships, experiences, activities that change lives
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma on April 8, 2026, the University of Tulsa announced it had been granted a substantial $12 million donation from the Asbjornson Foundation. This generous gift is designated to enhance student scholarships and provide valuable high-impact learning experiences. The aim is to increase accessibility to a UTulsa education and enable students to excel in their academic pursuits and personal growth.

data.title: Barrick Files 2026 Information Circular Ahead of Annual Meeting
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Barrick Mining Corporation (NYSE:B)(TSX:ABX) released its 2026 Information Circular and accompanying documents for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. These materials can be accessed on SEDAR+ (www.sedarplus.ca), EDGAR (www.sec.gov), and Barrick’s official website.

data.title: Preferred Bank Announces 2026 First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: An independent commercial bank based in California, Preferred Bank (NASDAQ: PFBC), is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The report is scheduled for release before the market opens on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. Alongside the disclosure, the bank's management will conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time (11:00 a.m. Pacific Time) on the same day. The call will also be streamed live on the internet for broader accessibility.

data.title: Apogee Acquisition Corp Announces Closing of $172.5 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: Apogee Acquisition Corp, a blank check company from Cheyenne, WY, completed its initial public offering on April 8, 2026. The offering consisted of 17,250,000 units sold at $10.00 per unit, with an additional 2,250,000 units exercised by the underwriters. This brought the total gross proceeds to $172,500,000 before deducting underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. The Company was formed with the intent to merge, conduct a share exchange, acquire assets, purchase shares, or reorganize with one or more businesses.

data.title: Marksmen Energy Inc. Announces Completion of Consolidation
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on April 8, 2026, Marksmen Energy Inc. (TSXV: MAH) has announced that following the news release from January 26, 2026, the Corporation has received approval from its shareholders for a consolidation of its common shares. This consolidation, referred to as the "Consolidation," will involve combining every forty (40) pre-consolidation Common Shares into one (1) post-consolidation Common Share, with the exact ratio to be decided by the Board of Directors pending regulatory clearance.

data.title: CEA Industries Inc. Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Louisville, Colorado, on April 8, 2026, CEA Industries Inc. (NASDAQ: BNC) shared that the Board of Directors has given the green light for granting restricted stock units (“RSUs”) to Brent Miller, who took on the role of Chief Financial Officer as of March 9, 2026. This move falls under the CEA Industries Inc. 2026 Inducement Plan, with the RSUs serving as an incentive for Mr. Miller joining the Company, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Trump Offers This Olive Branch; AI Play Eyes Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a positive movement on the stock market, while technology giant Apple also saw an increase in its stock value. President Donald Trump extended a gesture of reconciliation towards Iran despite escalating tensions. The stock market today was marked by optimism as the Dow rose, and investors closely watched the developments. The news of Trump's olive branch to Iran added to the uncertainty surrounding the situation. Additionally, there was a focus on the potential entry of artificial intelligence in the market, indicating a potential shift in investment trends.

data.title: Commerce.com Board of Directors Comments on Unsolicited Proposal from Rezolve Ai
data.description: The offer put forth vastly undervalues the company, with a figure that falls short of its true worth. This insufficient proposal does not merit additional discussions or considerations, as it fails to accurately reflect the company's value. The discrepancy between the offer and the company's actual value is substantial, making it clear that further engagement is not warranted at this time.

data.title: /U P D A T E -- America First Credit Union/
data.description: America First Credit Union has announced the appointment of Jessica Graham as Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer on April 8, 2026. The news release came from America First Credit Union through PR Newswire. The updated information includes important changes to the organization's leadership team.

data.title: Google adds Notebooks feature to Gemini, integrating NotebookLM for AI project management. Paid users can access now with free users to follow.
data.description: Gemini has now introduced notebooks that sync with NotebookLM for AI-enhanced project management. The feature is currently accessible to paid subscribers, with availability for free users set to follow shortly. Stay tuned for more details.

data.title: Constellation Brands Earnings Slide But Beat Expectations
data.description: In the fourth quarter, the beer business saw a return to growth, showing positive signs for the company. However, despite this improvement, the company decided to withdraw its fiscal 2028 guidance. The recent earnings report from Constellation Brands showed a slight decline, although it exceeded expectations, signaling potential resilience in the market despite challenges.

data.title: Dane Technologies Launches Dane AirViewer to Eliminate Warehouse Blind Spots and Automate Inventory Intelligence
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Dane Technologies introduced Dane AirViewer, a new cloud-based analytics platform. This system aims to analyze the large amounts of inventory data gathered by the Dane AIR™ DC robot. The platform provides visually appealing insights and actionable information to improve decision-making.

data.title: Ingles Markets Issues Investor Presentation Highlighting Company’s Long Record of Value Creation, Disciplined Strategy and Risks Posed by Sacklers’ Summer Road
data.description: Asheville-based Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA) released an investor presentation ahead of its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on April 30, 2026. The presentation emphasizes Ingles' position as a prominent regional grocer known for its robust community ties, consistent performance, and effective strategic approach. Shareholders can access the full presentation online. The event will showcase key details about the company, illustrating its strong market presence and growth potential.

data.title: Employment & Labor Lawyers, at Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik De Blouw LLP, File Suit Against Petsmart LLC, Alleging Failure to Provide Meal Periods and Rest Breaks
data.description: Petsmart LLC is accused of not properly compensating their employees by not allowing meal breaks, leading to violations of California Labor codes. The incident took place in Sacramento, California, as reported on April 8, 2026. The Sacramento employment law attorneys at Blumenthal Nordrehaug are investigating the case.

data.title: In HelloNation, Plumbing and HVAC Supply Expert Ken Decker of Albany, New York Outlines What Causes Profit Loss for Busy Contractors
data.description: Albany, New York - On April 8, 2026, a recent examination delves into the challenges faced by plumbing and HVAC contractors in Albany in turning their busy schedules into lasting profits. Many contractors in the area find themselves concluding each month with lower profits than expected despite their high workloads. This trend raises questions as to why these professionals are struggling financially even with their busy schedules. The article aims to explore the reasons behind this discrepancy in financial outcomes.

data.title: European steel maker ArcelorMittal provides tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for White House's new ballroom.
data.description: European steel manufacturer ArcelorMittal will be contributing tens of millions of dollars worth of foreign steel to be used in the construction of a new ballroom for President Trump.

data.title: Fraud is Hitting Home: New AARP Research Shows Millions at Risk as AARP New York Mobilizes Statewide
data.description: In April, AARP NY is hosting complimentary community shredding events and offering support to empower locals. Recent AARP studies reveal fraud as a prevalent and escalating issue. Approximately 103 million Americans, equating to nearly 40% of adults, have already been impacted by fraudulent activities.

data.title: NRG Energy to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Electricity company NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6, 2026. The management will discuss the results in a conference call and webcast scheduled for 9:00 a.m. EST (8:00 a.m. CST). Prior to the call, NRG will release a press statement with the financial results which will also be posted on their website www.nrg.com. For those interested, the live webcast and presentation materials will be available at investors.n.
White House: ‘President Trump issued a proclamation adjusting sequestration for fiscal year 2027 pursuant to the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act as amended.’
Rutte and Trump meeting ends
